title: allaboutthebump AWe've been keeping a little secret Pregnancy Announcement Card, Baby Reveal, White Premium Card Stock, 15 x 15 cm, Little Secret Message, Includes Envelope
features: PREMIUM DESIGN: Elegant pregnancy announcement card crafted on luxurious white card stock featuring delicate script typography and a charming heart detail
PERFECT SIZE: Measures 15 x 15 centimetres, making it an ideal size for displaying or preserving as a cherished keepsake
VERSATILE FORMAT: Blank interior provides generous space for your personal message, perfect for surprising family and loved ones with your special news
COMPLETE PACKAGE: Includes matching white envelope and is printed on premium card stock with a professional finish for sophisticated presentation
THOUGHTFUL MESSAGE: Features the heartwarming phrase 'We've been keeping a little secret' in an elegant script design, perfect for pregnancy announcements
description: Share your precious secret in the most delightful way with this elegantly designed pregnancy announcement card. The beautifully crafted 15 x 15 centimetre card features the heartwarming message 'We've been keeping a little secret' accompanied by a charming heart detail, making it perfect for those special reveal moments. Printed on premium white card stock with a luxurious finish, this card provides an excellent writing surface for your personal message. The minimalist design is enhanced with clean typography and subtle botanical accents, creating a timelessly elegant keepsake. Each card comes complete with a matching white envelope for sophisticated presentation. The versatile blank interior allows ample space for your own heartfelt words, making each announcement uniquely yours. Whether surprising your partner, family members, or announcing to future grandparents, this thoughtfully designed card offers the perfect way to capture this magical moment. The premium quality ensures it can be treasured as a lasting memento of your joyful news.
